driver_subject: iio:common:ssp: Switch from CONFIG_PM_SLEEP guards to pm_sleep_ptr() etc
kernel_subject: PM: core: Add new *_PM_OPS macros, deprecate old ones
stage1_reason: All four commits adapt to kernel API changes: 1) PM_SLEEP macro to pm_sleep_ptr() and SIMPLE_DEV_PM_OPS, 2) EXPORT_SYMBOL to EXPORT_SYMBOL_NS for symbol namespacing, 3) of_match_node() to device_get_match_data() for device property handling, 4) spi_driver.remove callback return type change from int to void.
stage2_reason: Kernel commit introduces new *_PM_OPS macros and pm_sleep_ptr(), deprecating old CONFIG_PM_SLEEP patterns, directly matching driver's migration from CONFIG_PM_SLEEP guards to pm_sleep_ptr() and SIMPLE_DEV_PM_OPS.
